allow: PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { try { $cmd = \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).CommandLine; "$\($_.Id\): $cmd" } catch {} })

PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-File -FilePath "D:\\inventory-mixmart\\tsc-check.log" -Encoding utf8; Get-Content "D:\\inventory-mixmart\\tsc-check.log" | Select-Object -First 80; "---END---"; \(Get-Item "D:\\inventory-mixmart\\tsc-check.log"\).Length)

PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe" .\\node_modules\\typescript\\bin\\tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-File -FilePath "D:\\inventory-mixmart\\tsc-check.log" -Encoding utf8; "EXITCODE=$LASTEXITCODE"; Get-Content "D:\\inventory-mixmart\\tsc-check.log" | Select-Object -First 120)
